title: Number of Burgers with No Waste of Ingredients
titleCn: 不浪费原料的汉堡制作方案

testcases.input: tomatoSlices = 16, cheeseSlices = 7 Output: [1,6] Explantion: To make one jumbo burger and 6 small burgers we need 4*1 + 2*6 = 16 tomato and 1 + 6 = 7 cheese. There will be no remaining ingredients.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,6] Explantion: To make one jumbo burger and 6 small burgers we need 4*1 + 2*6 = 16 tomato and 1 + 6 = 7 cheese. There will be no remaining ingredients.

testcases.input: tomatoSlices = 17, cheeseSlices = 4 Output: [] Explantion: There will be no way to use all ingredients to make small and jumbo burgers.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explantion: There will be no way to use all ingredients to make small and jumbo burgers.

testcases.input: tomatoSlices = 4, cheeseSlices = 17 Output: [] Explantion: Making 1 jumbo burger there will be 16 cheese remaining and making 2 small burgers there will be 15 cheese remaining.
testcases.expectedOutput: [] Explantion: Making 1 jumbo burger there will be 16 cheese remaining and making 2 small burgers there will be 15 cheese remaining.
